title: anthoxanthum monticola subsp. alpinum
intro: Anthoxanthum monticola subsp. alpinum, also known as alpine oat grass, is a subspecies of the Anthoxanthum monticola plant that is native to the mountainous regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Alpinum is believed to provide various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
